title: Canned Responses & Templates
content:
Canned responses are pre-written reply templates that agents can insert with one click — saving time on common replies.

**Creating a Canned Response:**
1. Settings → Canned Responses → New.
2. Enter a short-code (e.g., 'billing-inquiry') — agents type this to trigger it.
3. Write the full response body. Use placeholders: {{customer_name}}, {{ticket_id}}, {{agent_name}}.
4. Assign to a category (optional) and click Save.

**Using Canned Responses:**
In the ticket reply box, type '/' or the short-code → a dropdown shows matching canned responses → click to insert.

**Sharing Canned Responses:**
By default, canned responses are personal. Admins can mark them as 'Shared' — visible to all agents.

**Bulk Import:**
Admins can bulk upload via CSV: Settings → Canned Responses → Import. CSV format: shortcode, title, body.
